admission_process: Download KEA Confirmation Slip from KEA login
Report to Main Library (Building No.2) for biometric attendance and admission order copy
Scan original documents in color (JPG/JPEG under 1MB)
Upload documents and passport-size photo (under 500KB)
Submit allotment letter and application number at Fee Section (Building No.1, 2nd Floor, Room 206)
Pay fees via Debit Card / UPI / NEFT / RTGS
Collect fee challan
Print application using fee challan reference
Submit original documents
Obtain acknowledgement
documents_required: KEA Confirmation Slip with fee paid receipt
Parent PAN Card / Aadhaar Card (Soft Copy)
Student Passport Size Photo, Signature & Aadhaar (Soft Copy)
Passport & Visa copy (for students studied outside India)

admission_process: Obtain allotment order from KEA
Report to Admission Section, Library Block, DSCE, Bangalore (Building No. 02)
Verification of admission order and original documents
Wait for turn to complete online admission entry
Mention student name, mobile number, and branch on back of Demand Draft
Submit Demand Draft to cashier
Complete online application entry
Take printout of application form
Candidate and parents must sign the form
Submit required documents to admission authority
Obtain acknowledgement
Collect fee paid receipt from cashier using acknowledgement

fee_structure.payment_mode: Demand Draft in favor of Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering, payable at Bangalore
fee_structure.notes: KEA tuition fee already paid to KEA; only remaining college components payable at DSCE

documents_required: Original Admission Order issued by KEA
Original Transfer Certificate (if qualified outside Karnataka PU Board)
Original Migration Certificate (if qualified outside Karnataka PU Board)
3 sets of attested photocopies of all submitted documents
